headline: American International Group (AIG) Fell Following the Announcement of the Leadership Transition
summary: Hotchkis & Wiley, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Hotchkis & Wiley Mid-Cap Value Fund.” A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In the first quarter, geopolitical instability and AI-focused investments were the key market drivers. The energy sector significantly benefited from the Brent crude oil surge […]
